description: You are a Security Management Specialist. The 24/7 SOC team needs a single-pane-of-glass dashboard for their shift handoff procedures. Using the Splunk web interface (http://localhost:8000, credentials: admin / SplunkAdmin1!), create an interactive form-based dashboard named 'SOC_Shift_Handoff'. The dashboard must feature a dropdown input control with the token name 'selected_index' and choices for 'security_logs', 'web_logs', and 'system_logs'. Include at least three distinct panels—such as an event volume timechart, a top sources table, and a recent notable events list—that all dynamically update based on the selected index using the $selected_index$ token in their search queries.
